company_overview.primary_theme: Strong financial performance amid economic uncertainty

segment_highlights.performance: Revenue of $10.5 billion, net income of $2.5 billion
Revenue of $6 billion, net income of $1 billion
Revenue of $6 billion, earnings of $1.9 billion
Revenue of $5.6 billion, earnings of $1.9 billion

explicit_risks.risk: Economic slowdown due to tariffs and policy uncertainty

causal_claims.claim: Strong organic growth and diversified loan portfolio support resilience in economic downturns

high_signal_summary: Net income of $7.4 billion, up from $6.7 billion YoY.
NII grew 3% YoY, driven by global markets activity.
Deposits reached nearly $2 trillion, growing 8% from mid-2023.
Commercial loans grew across nearly every line of business.
CET1 ratio at 11.8%, well above the requirement.
Tangible book value per share rose 9% YoY to $27.12.
Sales and trading revenue grew 9% YoY.
Strong digital engagement with over 14 billion logins in 2024.
Expecting strong full-year NII improvement of 6% to 7%.
Maintained strong asset quality with net charge-offs at $1.45 billion.
